creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bdrewery

New Revision: 303676

Log:
  - Update to 1.9

+++ head/mail/roundcube-contextmenu/Makefile	Tue Sep  4 22:06:24 2012	(r303676)
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	contextmenu
-PORTVERSION=	1.8
+PORTVERSION=	1.9
 CATEGORIES=	mail
 MASTER_SITES=	http://www.tehinterweb.co.uk/roundcube/plugins/
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	roundcube-
